title: MineDrill
description: MineDrill is a 3Г—3 automatic mining drill that supports multiple fuels, places torches every few blocks, and builds Cobblestone beneath itself for safe tunneling. Simple, efficient, and survival-friendly.
body:
![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8ade80070e379cbebd91bae6c66cb1598703071.webp)

в›ЏпёЏ MineDrill вЂ“ Advanced 3Г—3 Automatic Mining Drill

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

**A fully rewritten 3Г—3 automatic mining drill with a fixed fuel system, no duplication bugs, smart torch placement, and automatic cobblestone path protection.**

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

рџ”Ґ Critical Fixes

в›Ѕ Fuel System Reworked вЂ“ no more infinite fuel or duplication

рџ•ЇпёЏ Torch System Fixed вЂ“ consumes 1 torch every 8 blocks correctly

рџ“¦ Item Duplication Fixed вЂ“ no more coal or torch duplication

рџ›ЎпёЏ Bedrock Detection вЂ“ drill stops instantly before bedrock

рџљ« Unbreakable Blocks Protected вЂ“ cannot break protected blocks

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

рџ†• New Features

рџ§± Auto Cobblestone вЂ“ places blocks under the drill over lava, water, or gaps

рџЋЇ Improved Hitbox вЂ“ matches the visual model perfectly

рџ“ќ Tooltip System вЂ“ hold Shift for detailed info

рџЊЌ Arabic Support вЂ“ full ar_sa translation

в›ЏпёЏ Tool Requirement вЂ“ requires stone pickaxe or better to break

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

рџЋ® Features

- в›ЏпёЏ 3Г—3 Mining вЂ“ mines a full area at once

- в›Ѕ Flexible Fuel вЂ“ supports multiple fuel types

- рџ•ЇпёЏ Auto Torch вЂ“ places torch every 8 blocks

- рџ§± Path Safety вЂ“ keeps the drill safe on dangerous terrain

- рџ›ЎпёЏ Bedrock Stop вЂ“ prevents breaking into bedrock

- рџЋ’ 2 Slots вЂ“ fuel + torches

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

рџ”Ґ Fuel Values

- рџЄЁ Block of Coal в†’ 80 blocks
- рџЊї Dried Kelp Block в†’ 20 blocks
- рџ”Ґ Blaze Rod в†’ 12 blocks
- вљ« Coal в†’ 8 blocks
- рџЄµ Charcoal в†’ 8 blocks

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

рџ›ЎпёЏ Protected Blocks

- Bedrock
- End Portal Frame
- End Portal
- Command Blocks
- Barrier
- Structure Block
- Spawner
- Reinforced Deepslate

вњЁвњЁвњЁ

рџ“– How to Use

- в›Ѕ Insert fuel in Slot 1
- рџ•ЇпёЏ Insert torches in Slot 2
- в–¶пёЏ Press the start button
- в›ЏпёЏ The drill will mine automatically

вњЁвњЁвњЁ
